reason: While adding DNS servers is generally safe, modifying /etc/resolv.conf can lead to immediate loss of network connectivity or name resolution if incorrect IP addresses are provided. In modern RHEL 9 systems, /etc/resolv.conf is often managed by NetworkManager or systemd-resolved; manual edits may be overwritten or cause conflicts with the network management stack.
estimated_impact: networking affected; Potential loss of network connectivity if incorrect DNS IPs are used; Conflict with network management services (NetworkManager/systemd-resolved); Potential breakage of service discovery/name resolution
